parameters.query: SELECT id as booking_id, status, gcal_event_id FROM bookings WHERE idempotency_key = $1::text AND status != 'CANCELLED' LIMIT 1;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Validate Input').first().json.provider_id }}, {{ $('Validate Input').first().json.service_id }}, {{ $('Validate Input').first().json.start_time }}, {{ $('Validate Input').first().json.end_time }}, {{ $('Validate Input').first().json.idempotency_key }}, {{ $('Extract GCal Event ID').first().json.gcal_event_id }}, {{ $('Validate Input').first().json.customer_id || '' }}
